steps.title: Follow the feedback loop
steps.content: The example says coastline geography influences sediment deposition, and deposition later alters coastal geography. That is a two-way relationship among factors shaping the river delta.

steps.title: Reject nonreciprocal meanings
steps.content: B means rigid, C means weak or insubstantial, and D means all-inclusive or thorough. None captures factors that affect one another. The answer is A.
